Next-generation tech · Since 2009

A customer touch point has two sides. Finally, both of them work.

For fifteen years, ID24 has pioneered customer-facing technology — for staff working stores, front desks and bank offices. We re-invented anything from the paper form, customer display hardware to fraud detection using AI.

Book a pilot → See the product suite →
15 yrs
Retail tech expertise
Accelerator company 2026–27
AAA
Many years with high credit rating
20+
Country installations

Two screens. Two users. One seamless experience.

Duo Input™ is an ID24 patented software that enables true simultaneous touch input across multiple displays — no cursor conflicts, no interruptions, no operating-system workarounds. Two people can work on two screens at the same time, and it just works. Perfect for digital forms in a bank office, or a loyalty registration form in a store or hotel.

Display 1

Name confirmation

Signature

Display 2

Signature

Product suite

Technology for every customer touchpoint

Since 2009, ID24 brings together interface design, device software, data validation, AI, and purpose-built hardware into flexible solutions.

Use cases

Built for real customer touchpoints

Retail & hotel

Keep sign-ups at the counter

Your sign-up registration rate is only 20% when sending SMS confirmations to customers in-store? Many in-store sign-up flows lose customers when registration continues by SMS after the interaction has already moved on.

With next-generation customer displays, the customer can complete the flow directly at the counter — improving conversion, data quality, and the overall service experience.

Read more in our Retail section →

Banks

Give both sides their own screen

Many bank offices still rely on shared tablets for digital agreements, customer data, and signatures. Passing one device back and forth can feel clumsy, slow, and easy to get wrong.

With separate screens for the advisor and the customer, both sides can work together in a smoother, clearer, and more professional flow.

Read more in our Banking section →

Hardware

Software is nothing without a screen worth looking at.

ID24 runs on any consumer-grade tablet — Android, iOS, or Windows — so pilots can start cheap and fast. For production deployments, our D|2 displays are purpose-built for the till.

Robust. Metal-sheet construction built for the retail floor, not the office.
Three sizes. 10", 13.3", and 15.6" — picked to fit different counter layouts.
Front-mounted NFC. Enables smart payments and fallback when the main terminal or network drops.
Loyalty card cameras. Integrated cameras scan loyalty cards cleanly, every time.

Compatible hardware we've deployed with

10” D|2 T2

Patents & protection

Innovative solutions with protection

Protected core

Simultaneous input

Protection around assisted interactions where cashier and customer operate in parallel, without collisions or OS-level workarounds.

Protected UX

Helper-button keyboard

Design-protected field assistance that reduces friction and accelerates collection tasks such as email capture.

Why it matters

Protection that becomes positioning

For modern B2B buyers, patents are not just legal assets. They signal product originality, strengthen category ownership, and create confidence that the workflow is difficult to copy.

Defensibility
Stronger moat
Speed
Lower friction
Position
Enterprise trust

Fraud detection AI

Detect anomalies before they become losses.

AI-based transaction analysis helps identify suspicious behavior, reduce errors and strengthen internal control.

✓
Fewer cashier errors Detect unusual patterns faster.

✓
Lower operational costs Reduce shrinkage and manual review time.
